title: Senior Software Engineer - BankBazaar Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BankBazaar Advisory Limited - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
